news.title: Tata Chemicals voluntarily dissolved its UK units Cheshire Salt Holdings, New Cheshire Salt Works.
news.summary: Tata Chemicals voluntarily dissolved its UK units Cheshire Salt Holdings, New Cheshire Salt Works.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.
Rapid fire: Sell GAIL, Info Edge; Buy UNO Minda, Sona BLW; Hold Asian Paints, HAL, Tata Chemicals.
news.summary:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.

news.title: Tata Chemicals shares surged 11%, outperforming a weak market.
news.summary: Tata Chemicals shares surged 11%, outperforming a weak market.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals surged 11% amid hopes of value unlocking via Tata Sons' listing.
Tata Sons must list by Sept 2025 as an upper layer NBFC per RBI rules.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals surged 11% amid hopes of value unlocking via Tata Sons' listing.
Tata Sons must list by Sept 2025 as an upper layer NBFC per RBI rules.

news.title:
ONGC achieves gas monetization in Daman Project; Tata Chemicals hits 1M tonnes soda ash production.
BEL secures ₹1660 crore orders; NTPC Green Energy signs MoU with PTC India for renewable energy sales.
news.summary:
ONGC achieves gas monetization in Daman Project; Tata Chemicals hits 1M tonnes soda ash production.
BEL secures ₹1660 crore orders; NTPC Green Energy signs MoU with PTC India for renewable energy sales.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals simplifies UK holding structure; GHUL transfers assets to HFUK.
Post-transfer, GHUL ceases as material subsidiary; HFUK becomes intermediate holding company.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals simplifies UK holding structure; GHUL transfers assets to HFUK.
Post-transfer, GHUL ceases as material subsidiary; HFUK becomes intermediate holding company.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals produced 1M tonnes of soda ash in FY26 at Mithapur, Gujarat.
VP Rino Raj credits the milestone to operational rigour and team commitment.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals produced 1M tonnes of soda ash in FY26 at Mithapur, Gujarat.
VP Rino Raj credits the milestone to operational rigour and team commitment.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals' Mithapur plant achieved 1M tonnes soda ash production in FY 2025–26.
This milestone reflects strong operational progress for Tata Chemicals.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals' Mithapur plant achieved 1M tonnes soda ash production in FY 2025–26.
This milestone reflects strong operational progress for Tata Chemicals.

news.title:
India's ISM 2.0 boosts semiconductor ecosystem, benefiting chemical firms like Gujarat Fluorochemicals and Navin Fluorine.
Stocks such as Archean Chemicals, Neogen Chemicals, and Tata Chemicals see opportunities in semiconductor-related materials.
news.summary:
India's ISM 2.0 boosts semiconductor ecosystem, benefiting chemical firms like Gujarat Fluorochemicals and Navin Fluorine.
Stocks such as Archean Chemicals, Neogen Chemicals, and Tata Chemicals see opportunities in semiconductor-related materials.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley downgraded Tata Chemicals from 'overweight' to 'underweight', slashing target price to Rs 566 from Rs 1,082.
Key challenges include oversupply, surging energy costs, and demand headwinds. Bear case sees stock falling to Rs 475.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley downgraded Tata Chemicals from 'overweight' to 'underweight', slashing target price to Rs 566 from Rs 1,082.
Key challenges include oversupply, surging energy costs, and demand headwinds. Bear case sees stock falling to Rs 475.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals' subsidiary, TCIPL, completed Novabay Pte. Ltd. acquisition on March 19, 2026.
The acquisition follows conditions in the Share Purchase Agreement disclosed earlier.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals' subsidiary, TCIPL, completed Novabay Pte. Ltd. acquisition on March 19, 2026.
The acquisition follows conditions in the Share Purchase Agreement disclosed earlier.

news.title:
Fitch affirms Tata Chemicals' Long-Term Foreign Currency IDR at BB with Stable outlook.
Rating update follows revised Corporate Rating Criteria, effective February 6, 2026.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms Tata Chemicals' Long-Term Foreign Currency IDR at BB with Stable outlook.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals to establish ₹515 cr greenfield facility in Tamil Nadu.
The facility is planned at Valinokkam, Ramnathapuram district, TN.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals to establish ₹515 cr greenfield facility in Tamil Nadu.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals expects UK operations to nearly break-even by Q4 FY26, with profits next year.
Kenya's 50 KT soda ash plant aims for stabilization by March 2026, boosting EBITDA via better quality, lower emissions.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals expects UK operations to nearly break-even by Q4 FY26, with profits next year.
Kenya's 50 KT soda ash plant aims for stabilization by March 2026, boosting EBITDA via better quality, lower emissions.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals expects slow medium-term soda ash demand growth due to solar glass rise and steady sector use.
Short-term demand may lag behind global supply, impacting prices and margins; economic recovery seen as gradual.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals expects slow medium-term soda ash demand growth due to solar glass rise and steady sector use.
Short-term demand may lag behind global supply, impacting prices and margins; economic recovery seen as gradual.

news.title:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.
news.summary:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals released Q3 and 9-month FY26 results on Feb 2, 2026.
Results include unaudited consolidated and audited standalone data; audio link shared.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals released Q3 and 9-month FY26 results on Feb 2, 2026.
Results include unaudited consolidated and audited standalone data; audio link shared.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals presented Q3FY26 results showing revenue at ₹3,550 Cr, down from ₹3,877 Cr in Q2FY26 due to lower soda ash realization and seasonal factors.
Key highlights include increased sales volumes, lower fixed expenses, and strategic expansions in soda ash, bi-carb, and silica plants for future growth.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals presented Q3FY26 results showing revenue at ₹3,550 Cr, down from ₹3,877 Cr in Q2FY26 due to lower soda ash realization and seasonal factors.
Key highlights include increased sales volumes, lower fixed expenses, and strategic expansions in soda ash, bi-carb, and silica plants for future growth.

news.title: Tata Chemicals approves ₹5.15B investment for a greenfield iodised vacuum salt facility.
news.summary: Tata Chemicals approves ₹5.15B investment for a greenfield iodised vacuum salt facility.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹3.45B from ₹4.34B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 9.7% from 12.1% YoY.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹3.45B from ₹4.34B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 9.7% from 12.1% YoY.
